description.a_n: the general (signed) term (-1)^n b_n of the alternating series
description.b_n: the positive magnitude |a_n| of the term
description.L: the limit of b_n (must be 0 for the Alternating Series Test)
description.N: number of terms kept in a partial sum
description.R: remainder / truncation error after N terms
description.p: exponent of a p-series used when testing absolute convergence

subscript_convention: Use a_n for the signed term, b_n for its magnitude, and R_N for the remainder after N terms.
